examples.title: Creating a FIFO
examples.description: Program to create a FIFO using mkfifo()
examples.explanation: Creates a FIFO at /tmp/myfifo with read/write permissions for all users. Returns -1 if FIFO already exists or creation fails.

examples.title: FIFO Writer Process
examples.explanation: Opens FIFO in write-only mode (blocks until reader opens), writes a message, then closes the file descriptor.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n is message length

examples.title: FIFO Reader Process
examples.explanation: Opens FIFO in read-only mode (blocks until writer opens), reads available data into buffer, prints received message.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n is bytes read

examples.title: Non-blocking FIFO Operations
examples.description: Using O_NONBLOCK flag for non-blocking FIFO operations
examples.explanation: Opens FIFO with O_NONBLOCK flag. read() returns immediately with EAGAIN if no data, 0 if writer closed, or actual data if available.
